The main claim is: One intuitive picture I have for what very rapid ML capability gains might look like is a massive multimodal deep learning model that uses some form of online federated learning to continually learn from many devices simultaneously, and wh…

For example, imagine a multimodal Google or Facebook chatbot with say 10 trillion parameters that could interact with billions of users simultaneously and which improved its weights from every interaction.
